body:
- Fixes several typos of the manuscript submission to JOSS: https://github.com/openjournals/joss-reviews/issues/4869,
- Adds missing reference,
- Shortens section without modifying content,
- Updates pdf.
title: Some typo fixes, and paragraph shortening.
